creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
FREE spots in Dubai to visit this winter:

🌅 Al Jaddaf Walk - a beautiful promenade with a view of Dubai skyline. Best for late afternoon walks and sunset photoshoots. 

🦩 Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary - see flamingos in their natural habitat. Timings on Winter season (October – March): 7:30am – 5:30pm.

🌉 BBQ spot near Business Bay bridge: a laidback public area by the creek. Bring your picnic mats and camping gears.

🔓 Al Khawaneej Walk - a neighborhood mall with love lock bridge, al fresco dining area, food trucks, and lots of cool photo spots. 

Tag your besties and plan your next day out!
